allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const styleStart=html.indexOf\('<style>'\); const styleEnd=html.indexOf\('</style>'\); console.log\('Style block found:',styleStart,styleEnd\); const scriptStart=html.indexOf\('<script'\); const scriptEnd=html.lastIndexOf\('</script>'\); console.log\('Script block found:',scriptStart,scriptEnd\); console.log\('File length:',html.length\)")
